description: Minimal TFT-based dimensional core for Mudpuppy (Spacetime v2.0beta). Uses triadic-time alignment and nested spatial layers. No SET, S-N-R, or FFF. Transitional core prior to triadic substrate adoption.

L1.notes: Stable, intuitive, and directly compatible with classical physics.

L2.notes: Derived from D6 harmonic time; supports curvature modulation and local geometric variation.

L3.notes: Proto-triadic behavior; enables early-stage triadic reasoning without full RTT substrate.

layer_transition.invariant: Spatial continuity preserved during harmonic uplift

core_stabilizer.invariant: All layers remain mutually consistent under triadic-time

steps: Begin in L1 classical spatial layer.
Apply layer_transition to enter L2 harmonic extension.
Use harmonic_extension to activate L3 triadic extension.
example_usage.expected_outcome: A stable nested spatial region aligned with D3/D6/D9 triadic-time layers.
